name: Hot-Fudge Sauce - Country Living Holidays
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium-sized heavy saucepan, combine chocolates, sugar, and corn syrup. Heat over low heat until chocolates melt and sugar dissolves.
2. Add butter, water, and vanilla, stirring until mixture is well blended and smooth.
3. Serve immediately or refrigerate and rewarm before serving.
